channel.description: Recent content in tools on errbufferoverfl

item.title: Temporal
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: Website · Github Repo An open source programming model that can be used to provide in depth tracing using the concept of “business logic as code”.

item.title: Distributed Press
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: Website · Github Repo An open source publishing tool for the World Wide Web and [[Distributed Web]]. It automates publishing to the world wide web, and seeds to IPFS and Holepunch.
